untranslatable_reason: Horns pattern requires 3-bar analysis with historical spike size comparison relative to 1-year median. This requires: (1) multi-bar sequence detection across 3+ weeks, (2) rolling 52-week ATR/range baseline calculation, (3) relative spike magnitude classification (above/below median). Available indicators lack historical rolling baseline storage and multi-bar pattern detection beyond prev_bar level. The pattern's core logic—comparing current spike size to historical median spike size in different market regimes—cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions.
